name: generator-kv
description: Generate SoloMkt-KV campaign KV images from current public models.

interface.shortDescription: Generate marketing KV images with SoloMkt-KV.
interface.longDescription: Generator-KV helps users configure a SoloMkt-KV API key, fetch the latest public model list, choose a model, collect campaign details, and generate KV image URLs through natural-language guidance.
defaultPrompt: 帮我配置 Generator-KV API Key
用 Generator-KV 生成活动主视觉
List Generator-KV models and create a campaign KV
